name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials
notes: This Building Block detects suspicious processes logging on with explicit credentials.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Success
when the event matches "Process Full Full Name" in ('cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'winrs.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'reg.exe') AQL filter query
when the event matches ("Machine Identifier" ILIKE '%localhost%' OR ("Account Full Full Name" ILIKE '%$' AND "Target Username" ILIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Remote Logon with Explicit Credentials on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Success
AND when the event matches "Process Full Full Name" in ('cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'pwsh.exe', 'winrs.exe', 'wmic.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'reg.exe') AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches ("Machine Identifier" ILIKE '%localhost%' OR ("Account Full Full Name" ILIKE '%$' AND "Target Username" ILIKE '%$')) AQL filter query
